name: Pina Colada Party Cake
recipeIngredient: 18 1/4 ozs reduced fat white cake mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 13 x 9-inch pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
3. To prepare batter, combine cake mix, 1/2 cup coconut, water, olive oil, 1/2 cup pineapple juice, 1 teaspoon rum extract, and egg whites. Mix well.
4. Pour batter into prepared pan.
5. Bake for 30 minutes or until lightly browned on top.
6. Meanwhile, combine remaining pineapple juice and sugar in a saucepan. Bring to a boil.
7. Using a fork, prick the cooled cake at 1/2-inch intervals.
8. Pour hot pineapple mixture over the cake.
9. Cool completely.
10. To prepare frosting, combine frosting and remaining rum extract. Mix well.
11. Frost the cake with the mixture and sprinkle with remaining coconut.
